name: Infura (Consensys)
description: Infura (Consensys) — Managed Ethereum and IPFS API infrastructure for reliable blockchain node access without self-hosting.

seo.title: Infura (Consensys) — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Infura (Consensys): Infura (Consensys) — Managed Ethereum and IPFS API infrastructure for reliable blockchain node access without self-hosting.

when_to_use: Managed Ethereum API without self-hosting a node
IPFS content storage and retrieval for dapp assets
Reliable node access for MetaMask and wallet backends
Polygon and Layer 2 RPC for DApp scaling
Archive node access for historical blockchain queries

pros: Archive node access on paid tiers
cons: Free tier rate limits hit quickly
review.verdict: Default choice for managed Ethereum RPC, though its dominance raises legitimate decentralization concerns.
review.best_for: Web3 teams needing reliable managed Ethereum nodes
